title: Independent Administrative Action. The institution of criminal action is
content: 8 without prejudice to any administrative action against the licensee or holder of authority 9 cognizable by the Department, which could proceed independently of the criminal action. 10 11 12 Anti-Illegal Recruitment and Anti-Trafficking in Persons Programs 13 14
